response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics and performance style perfectly match the song lyrics for 'Cobra' and 'IT'S LOVE'. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized to cross-check lyrics and identify the precise on-screen credits for the second song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps have been tightly anchored to vocal starts and visual credits, splitting pauses mid-sentence to ensure highly readable subtitles without cascading delays.

subtitles.original: コブラ... Only memories after you
subtitles.english: Cobra... Only memories after you...

subtitles.original: 背中に まとわりつく 陰りは
subtitles.english: The shadow that clings to my back...

subtitles.original: 男という名の 物語
subtitles.english: ...is a story called 'man'.

subtitles.original: 許されるはずもない Peace and Love
subtitles.english: There's no way it'll be forgiven, Peace and Love.

subtitles.original: 空をよぎる サイレント
subtitles.english: Crossing the sky silently...

subtitles.original: 抑えた バイオレット
subtitles.english: ...a restrained violet.

subtitles.original: うす汚れた日々
subtitles.english: In these dirty days...

subtitles.original: ひとり闇を歩む 奴さ
subtitles.english: ...he's a guy who walks through the darkness alone.

subtitles.original: コブラ Leaving me blue
subtitles.english: Cobra, leaving me blue...

subtitles.original: コブラ Missing you true
subtitles.english: ...Cobra, missing you true...

subtitles.original: コブラ Only memories after you
subtitles.english: ...Cobra, only memories after you.

subtitles.original: ハートに 刻まれた あの日は
subtitles.english: That day carved into my heart...

subtitles.original: ロマンと呼ぶには 熱すぎて
subtitles.english: ...was too hot to be called romance.

subtitles.original: 巡り来る はずもない Peace and Love
subtitles.english: There's no way it'll return, Peace and Love.

subtitles.original: IT'S LOVE / 作詞：岩佐友晴 作曲：野下俊哉
subtitles.english: [Song: IT'S LOVE / Lyrics: Tomoharu Iwasa / Music: Toshiya Noshita]

subtitles.original: 周りにいつも男たち
subtitles.english: There are always men...

subtitles.original: 取り巻いてて まるで君はビーナス
subtitles.english: ...surrounding you; you are just like Venus.

subtitles.original: ついに落としたミラクルさ
subtitles.english: I finally pulled off a miracle...

subtitles.original: 砂漠の中から見つけだしたジュエル
subtitles.english: ...and found a jewel in the middle of the desert.

subtitles.original: 迎えに行くよ どんなときも
subtitles.english: I'll come to pick you up, no matter when...

subtitles.original: 振り回されても Drastic & Crazy for you
subtitles.english: ...even if you lead me on, I'm drastic & crazy for you.

subtitles.original: 形の見えない 繋がりを
subtitles.english: An invisible connection...

subtitles.original: 信じたい Eye to Eye
subtitles.english: ...I want to believe in it, eye to eye.

subtitles.original: 時には確かめ合いたいよ
subtitles.english: Sometimes I want us to confirm it with each other...

subtitles.original: Don't you know, no, no, IT'S LOVE
subtitles.english: ...don't you know, no, no, IT'S LOVE.

subtitles.original: 小麦色した君の肌
subtitles.english: Your wheat-colored skin...

subtitles.original: やたらソフィスティケイト アクション 高すぎるよテンション
subtitles.english: ...your sophisticated actions, my tension is way too high.

subtitles.original: 会えない夜は目の下に
subtitles.english: On nights we can't meet, under my eyes...

subtitles.original: 黒いエニグマがシャドウを塗りに来る
subtitles.english: ...a black enigma comes to paint shadows.

subtitles.original: 違う匂いじゃ 火がつかない
subtitles.english: A different scent won't light my fire.

subtitles.original: Steal you, Smile you, まとめてマインドジャック
subtitles.english: Steal you, smile you, wrapping it all up as a mind jack.

subtitles.original: 形の見えない 繋がりで
subtitles.english: Through an invisible connection...

subtitles.original: 感じたい Heart to Heart
subtitles.english: ...I want to feel it, heart to heart.

subtitles.original: 時には確かめ合わなくちゃ
subtitles.english: Sometimes we have to confirm it with each other...

subtitles.original: Don't you know, no, no, IT'S LOVE
subtitles.english: ...don't you know, no, no, IT'S LOVE.

subtitles.original: カサブランカが素顔に戻るとき
subtitles.english: When the Casablanca lily returns to its true self...

subtitles.original: 宵闇の涙も見せて 折り取りに
subtitles.english: ...show me your twilight tears as I pluck you.

subtitles.original: 離さない 離れない このままいつまでも
subtitles.english: I won't let go, I won't leave, just like this forever...

subtitles.original: 時を重ねていこう そしていつか Come together
subtitles.english: ...let's make time pass together, and someday come together.

subtitles.original: 形の見えない 繋がりを
subtitles.english: An invisible connection...

subtitles.original: 信じたい Eye to Eye
subtitles.english: ...I want to believe in it, eye to eye.

subtitles.original: 時には確かめ合いたい
subtitles.english: Sometimes I want us to confirm it...
